'''鈭歴h-l-zh''' ('''shalazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yelp|yelp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yelp|yelp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-l-zh
|-
! Lemma
| shalazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalazhithi|shalazhithi]] || [[word:shalazhiji|shalazhiji]] || [[word:shalazhishi|shalazhishi]] || [[word:shalazhi|shalazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shalazhuthuth|shalazhuthuth]] || [[word:shalazhujuj|shalazhujuj]] || [[word:shalazhushush|shalazhushush]] || [[word:shalazh|shalazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shalazhuthu|shalazhuthu]] || [[word:shalazhuju|shalazhuju]] || [[word:shalazhushu|shalazhushu]] || [[word:shalazhu|shalazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shalazhufuth|shalazhufuth]] || [[word:shalazhufuj|shalazhufuj]] || [[word:shalazhufush|shalazhufush]] || [[word:shalazhuf|shalazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalazhethe|shalazhethe]] || [[word:shalazheje|shalazheje]] || [[word:shalazheshe|shalazheshe]] || [[word:shalazhe|shalazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shalazhothoth|shalazhothoth]] || [[word:shalazhojoj|shalazhojoj]] || [[word:shalazhoshosh|shalazhoshosh]] || [[word:shalazh|shalazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shalazhotho|shalazhotho]] || [[word:shalazhojo|shalazhojo]] || [[word:shalazhosho|shalazhosho]] || [[word:shalazho|shalazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shalazhofoth|shalazhofoth]] || [[word:shalazhofoj|shalazhofoj]] || [[word:shalazhofosh|shalazhofosh]] || [[word:shalazhof|shalazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalazh忙th忙|shalazh忙th忙]] || [[word:shalazh忙j忙|shalazh忙j忙]] || [[word:shalazh忙sh忙|shalazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:shalazh忙|shalazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shalazhathath|shalazhathath]] || [[word:shalazhajaj|shalazhajaj]] || [[word:shalazhashash|shalazhashash]] || [[word:shalazh|shalazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shalazhatha|shalazhatha]] || [[word:shalazhaja|shalazhaja]] || [[word:shalazhasha|shalazhasha]] || [[word:shalazha|shalazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shalazhafath|shalazhafath]] || [[word:shalazhafaj|shalazhafaj]] || [[word:shalazhafash|shalazhafash]] || [[word:shalazhaf|shalazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shalazhasha|shalazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalazhasha|goshalazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalazhasha|gokishalazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shalazhn眉sha|shalazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalazhnkn眉sha|goshalazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazhn眉sha|gokishalazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalazhsh毛sha|shalazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalazhnksh毛sha|goshalazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalazhsh毛sha|gokishalazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazhrosha|shalazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazhnkrosha|goshalazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazhrosha|gokishalazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazhmusha|shalazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazhnkmusha|goshalazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazhmusha|gokishalazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalazhsherasha|shalazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalazhnksherasha|goshalazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalazhsherasha|gokishalazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalazhngasha|shalazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalazhnkngasha|goshalazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalazhngasha|gokishalazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalazhyasha|shalazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalazhnkyasha|goshalazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalazhyasha|gokishalazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalazhyamasha|shalazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalazhnkyamasha|goshalazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalazhyamasha|gokishalazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalazhn眉sh毛sha|shalazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalazhnkn眉sh毛sha|goshalazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalazhn眉sh毛sha|gokishalazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazhn眉rosha|shalazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazhnkn眉rosha|goshalazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazhn眉rosha|gokishalazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazhn眉musha|shalazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazhnkn眉musha|goshalazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazhn眉musha|gokishalazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalazhsh毛n眉sha|shalazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalazhnksh毛n眉sha|goshalazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazhsh毛n眉sha|gokishalazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazhsh毛rosha|shalazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazhnksh毛rosha|goshalazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazhsh毛rosha|gokishalazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazhsh毛musha|shalazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazhnksh毛musha|goshalazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazhsh毛musha|gokishalazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalazhron眉sha|shalazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalazhnkron眉sha|goshalazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazhron眉sha|gokishalazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalazhrosh毛sha|shalazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalazhnkrosh毛sha|goshalazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalazhrosh毛sha|gokishalazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazhromusha|shalazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazhnkromusha|goshalazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazhromusha|gokishalazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalazhmun眉sha|shalazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalazhnkmun眉sha|goshalazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazhmun眉sha|gokishalazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalazhmush毛sha|shalazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalazhnkmush毛sha|goshalazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalazhmush毛sha|gokishalazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazhmurosha|shalazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazhnkmurosha|goshalazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazhmurosha|gokishalazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shalazh|shalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙l忙zh|sh忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshalazh|hoshalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙l忙zh|hosh忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshalazh|hohoshalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙l忙zh|hohosh忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shalazh|n眉shalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙l忙zh|n眉sh忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shalazh|n眉n眉shalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙l忙zh|n眉n眉sh忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shalazh|n茂shalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙l忙zh|n茂sh忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shalazh|n茂n茂shalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙l忙zh|n茂n茂sh忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushalazh|lushalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙l忙zh|lush忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushalazh|lulushalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙l忙zh|lulush忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishalazh|lishalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙l忙zh|lish忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishalazh|lilishalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙l忙zh|lilish忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshalazh|koshalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙l忙zh|kosh忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshalazh|kokoshalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙l忙zh|kokosh忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshalazh|keshalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙l忙zh|kesh忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshalazh|kekeshalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙l忙zh|kekesh忙l忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
